subject: Rajasthan History
question_hi: चिट्टोगरघाट के पुनर्स्थान कौन निर्देशन कर्तव्य के पद्यरत्न एवं संत अल्लाह ने शुरू हुआ था।
A_en: Alamgir and Saint Allahabadi alaon ki tarah, Chittorgarh Fort ko start kiya gaya tha.
B_en: Alauddin Khalji ne Chittorgarh Fort ka nirman ki hai.
C_en: Rani Kumbha ne Chittorgarh ki prapti ki hai.
D_en: Sirhind ki ruler aur Rana Kumbha ne Chittorgarh Fort ko start kiya gaya tha.
explanation_en: Alamgir and Saint Allahabadi, similar to Alamgir and Saint Allahabadi, started the construction of Chittorgarh Fort. Rani Kumbha also secured the fort, but the initiation of its construction is attributed to Alamgir and Saint Allahabadi.
